description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a robust, angular body with two prominent, forward-facing cannons mounted on the front. The vehicle sits on a wide, flat base, suggesting stability and heavy armor, with a compact, rectangular turret structure on top. The sides display mechanical details, including what appear to be access panels and reinforced plating, while the top has a circular hatch and additional surface detailing. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. The exterior is finished in a dark, matte color, likely to reduce visibility and glare. The vehicle's construction suggests it is built for urban combat scenarios, prioritizing protection and firepower.
description: A heavily armored, dark-colored combat vehicle with dual front-mounted cannons and a compact, angular turret. Its design emphasizes protection and firepower for urban tactical operations.
description_view_0: Front view shows two large cannons protruding from the turret and a wide, armored base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length of the cannons, the rectangular turret, and side access panels.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the turret and the vehicle's broad, flat base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cannons' length and side details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two large cannon mounts on the front turret.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; reinforced turret and base.
